detaileddescription.para: searches shader block by name and returns ID param 'layer' is optional and can be specified to assert that block belongs to this level

sets shader block by ID to proper layer; changes global state and executes corresponding stcode param 'layer' is optional and can be specified to assert that block belongs to this level param 'block_id' can be -1, this imply that NULL state is set to destination layer

briefdescription.para: gets currently set shader block ID for a layer

detaileddescription.para: checks whether shader block (specified by ID and optionaly with layer) is allowed to be set in current circumstances (i.e., it supports currently set blocks)

briefdescription.para: returns encoded state word that contains information about blocks set in each layer

detaileddescription.para: returns ID of block set in specified layer of block_state_word; can be rather slow since StateWord -> blockId resolution requires linear search

enables/disables automatic state block changes; returns previous permission state when automatic state block changes are disabled (default), attempt to draw anything with shader that doesn't support currently set blocks produces fatal error when enabled, drawing anything with shader that doesn't support currently set blocks causes changing set blocks to first suitable block configuration (can be slower than default mode, but definetely more safe to use in editors, etc.)
sets state blocks to change current state word to specified; designed primarily for internal use (in auto-block-change mode)

memberdef.argsstring: (int variable_id, float r, float g, float b=0.f, float a=0.f)
memberdef.name: set_float4

briefdescription.para: Set all texture global vars to BAD_TEXTUREID and issue release_managed_tex() on them.
Reset all var types, that are not valid after reset.
Reload references to resource for all related global shader vars.
Reset references to texture from all global shader vars.
Reset references to texture from all global shader vars and than calls release_managed_tex(id) and clears id.

simplesect.para: Global shader variables using glob_var_id; tolerant to glob_var_id=-1 (return 0); with DAGOR_DBGLEVEL>0 uses G_ASSERT to check that glob_var_id is in range and to check type.

briefdescription.para: Read list of global var values from DataBlock and sets them to shadr global variables.
Reset variables set by the set_vars_from_blk to their initial value (before setting any block, except textures).

memberdef.argsstring: (const ShaderVariableInfo &v, float r, float g, float b=0, float a=0)
memberdef.name: set_float4

memberdef.argsstring: (const ShaderVariableInfo &v, const Point2 &rg, float b=0, float a=0)
memberdef.name: set_float4

memberdef.argsstring: (const ShaderVariableInfo &v, int x, int y, int z, int w)
memberdef.name: set_int4
